title: Sanji Breaks Free
description: On pages 1–4, sanji breaks free focuses on Sanji, Kuroobi, Zoro, Hatchan as sanji, Zoro, and Usopp begin turning the battle around while Luffy’s rescue becomes the key to victory.
scene: On pages 1–4, sanji breaks free focuses on Sanji, Kuroobi, Zoro, Hatchan as sanji, Zoro, and Usopp begin turning the battle around while Luffy’s rescue becomes the key to victory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Even I...! Even I can do it! Did you see that, you fish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't you dare undere- stimulate me!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've already cried as much as I can...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: complained as much as I can...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But I've made my decision now!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
